chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1125 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 21.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Jamil Khanzada, advocate for respondent No.9 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Additional A.G Sindh a/w SIP Muhammad Kashan Khanzada *** Learned counsel for the respondent No.9 states that subject vehicle has already been handed over to respondent No.9. Be that as it may, no one is present on behalf of the petitioner. Same was the position on the last date of hearing, which prima facie reflects that petitioner has lost interest in the matter. Accordingly this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
